title: Day 05 Reflection
description: Routing changes how you think about app structure — note what clicked before the machine coding round.

prompts.question: Draw or describe your route tree: which routes are nested under DashboardLayout?
prompts.guidance: Include paths and which component renders in Outlet.

prompts.question: What broke during navigation and how did you fix it?
prompts.guidance: Wrong route, missing Outlet, or anchor vs Link.

prompts.question: Why is SPA routing better than toggling page state with useState in App?
What would you add before shipping this dashboard to production users?
prompts.guidance: Auth guards, loading, error boundaries — honest gaps.
